message:
fix(coordinator): fix 3 bugs in Quality Monitor found in fresh eyes review

1. Pass rate calculation: Use TestsPassed + TestsFailed instead of
   TestsTotal as denominator (skipped tests shouldn't count as failures)

2. Context trend analysis: Sort samples by timestamp before comparing
   time windows (aggregate from multiple agents was unsorted)

3. Error trend analysis: Track ErrorHistory slice per agent instead of
   just LastError timestamp (10 errors would only count as 1)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
